mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, order_no, product_id, product_name, product_image, spec_id, spec_name, product_price, product_num, total_price) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productImage}, #{item.specId}, #{item.specName}, #{item.productPrice}, #{item.productNum}, #{item.totalPrice})
